subject.template: Your POCBank customer profile ****{customer_id_last4} is now active
subject.resolved: Your POCBank customer profile ****0002 is now active

body.template:
Hi {customer_name},

Your POCBank customer profile (ID ending in ****{customer_id_last4}) is now active as of {timestamp}.

You can now:
• Open bank accounts
• Apply for POCBank products and services
• Update your KYC and profile details anytime through the mobile app

If this was not initiated by you, please reach us at https://www.pocbank.com/info/contact-us.
Reference: {event_id}

Regards,
POCBank
body.resolved:

subject.template: Your POCBank loan disbursement of Php {amount} is complete
subject.resolved: Your POCBank loan disbursement of Php 250000.00 is complete

body.resolved:
Hi Jose Reyes,

Your POCBank loan has been successfully disbursed.

• Amount: Php 250000.00
• Destination Account: ****K9X
• Date/Time: 2026-02-27T08:30:00.000+0000
• Reference Number: LNREF260001POCBK

You may check your amortization schedule through the POCBank mobile app.

If you have questions, please visit https://www.pocbank.com/info/contact-us.
Reference: c3d4e5f6-a7b8-9012-cdef-123456789012

Thank you,
POCBank Lending Team

subject.template: {days_overdue}-day past due reminder for your POCBank loan ****{loan_account_last4}
subject.resolved: 90-day past due reminder for your POCBank loan ****BK4W

body.resolved:
Hi Ana Villanueva,

This is a reminder that your loan payment is 90 day(s) past due.

• Loan Account: ****BK4W
• Minimum Amount Due: Php 15000.00
• Payment Deadline: 2026-03-06
• Reference Number: LNREF260001POCBK4W

Please make a payment as soon as possible to avoid additional charges.

If you have already paid, kindly disregard this message.

For concerns, visit https://www.pocbank.com/info/contact-us.
Reference: d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-defa-234567890123

Sincerely,
POCBank Lending Team

subject.template: Your POCBank fund transfer of Php {amount} is successful
